# SDP - Assets & CMDB (v3) — action docs

One page per action of the [`sdp-assets-cmdb-v3`](../README.md) connector: every parameter explained, plus copy-paste `input_data` variations. These pages are the targets of each operation's **Learn more** link (`externalDocs` + the description suffix in the definition).

| Action | Operation ID | Endpoint | Doc |
|---|---|---|---|
| Add CI relationship | `AddCIRelationship` | `POST /api/v3/{ci_type}/{ci_id}/assoc_ci_relationships` | [add-ci-relationship.md](add-ci-relationship.md) |
| Create CI | `CreateCI` | `POST /api/v3/{ci_type}` | [create-ci.md](create-ci.md) |
| Get asset | `GetAsset` | `GET /api/v3/assets/{asset_id}` | [get-asset.md](get-asset.md) |
| Get CI type metadata | `GetCITypeMetadata` | `GET /api/v3/{ci_type}/_metadata` | [get-ci-type-metadata.md](get-ci-type-metadata.md) |
| Get CI | `GetCI` | `GET /api/v3/{ci_type}/{ci_id}` | [get-ci.md](get-ci.md) |
| List all CIs | `ListAllCIs` | `GET /api/v3/cmdb` | [list-all-cis.md](list-all-cis.md) |
| List asset modules | `ListAssetModules` | `GET /api/v3/asset_modules` | [list-asset-modules.md](list-asset-modules.md) |
| List assets | `ListAssets` | `GET /api/v3/assets` | [list-assets.md](list-assets.md) |
| List CI relationships | `ListCIRelationships` | `GET /api/v3/{ci_type}/{ci_id}/assoc_ci_relationships` | [list-ci-relationships.md](list-ci-relationships.md) |
| List CI types | `ListCITypes` | `GET /api/v3/ci_types` | [list-ci-types.md](list-ci-types.md) |
| List CIs by type | `ListCIsByType` | `GET /api/v3/{ci_type}` | [list-cis-by-type.md](list-cis-by-type.md) |
| Update asset | `UpdateAsset` | `PUT /api/v3/assets/{asset_id}` | [update-asset.md](update-asset.md) |
| Update CI | `UpdateCI` | `PUT /api/v3/{ci_type}/{ci_id}` | [update-ci.md](update-ci.md) |
